title: DividendMax - notifications, declarations, forecasts and tools for UK private investors

inputs.desc: Search for a company by name or ticker

desc: For investors seeking dividend income in times of negative interest rates. Tools for planning future income and finding great yields

Power your investing with professional tools and institutional knowledge.
DividendMax provides professional tools that empower home investors to make smart trading decisions. Our tools make it easy to discover great buying opportunities, maximise yields, and track quality investments. Find quality, dividend-paying companies, invest in them and reinvest any dividends to accelerate returns.
As a DividendMax member, youâ€™ll benefit from the knowledge of our highly-experienced analyst team. You can create your own portfolio to track upcoming monthly dividend payments and identify your best-performing holdings. Weâ€™ll also provide you with a weekly digest email containing a market summary and a performance update, personalised to your portfolio.
TAKE A FREE TRIAL
DividendMax covers over 2,200 shares across UK, EU, and US.
Search our database by entering the share name in the search box below. Donâ€™t worry if you canâ€™t find a specific share, we add bespoke shares for Premium members, so weâ€™ll always have your stocks covered.

Reliable data
Accuracy like no other service. Our team of analysts research and review our dividend data daily to ensure itâ€™s up-to-date and complete. Our forecasts are the best in the industry.

Greater coverage
More markets, more shares, and more dividend projections than any rival consumer product. No other service can match our coverage and accuracy. DividendMax is the only service projecting dividend forecasts 2+ years ahead.

Expert opinion
Gain access to comprehensive industry knowledge via the DividendMax team. With news articles, daily comments, weekly digests and more, weâ€™ll keep you informed with insightful tips and analysis.
